summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Travelio voice-first travel booking MVP. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI functional with minor navigation test ID issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation test IDs are generated from translated text, making testing inconsistent across languages

integration_issues.issue: Confirmation modal not appearing after successful payment

passed_tests: Cities endpoint returns West African cities
Intent parsing in English and French with Claude Sonnet 4.5
Flight search returns 3 options (ECO, FAST, PREMIUM)
All payment methods (MTN MoMo, Google Pay, Apple Pay)
Home page loads with all key elements
Text input and intent parsing with badge display
Payment methods selection and phone input
Premium dark theme with glassmorphism effects
